title: clinopodium dolichodontum
intro: Clinopodium dolichodontum, also known as the long-toothed wild basil, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, reducing fever, and alleviating digestive issues. The health benefits of Clinopodium dolichodontum include its ability to soothe respiratory problems, ease menstrual cramps, and even help with stress relief. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed for its medicinal benefits or used topically for skin issues and wound care.
